description: Fire-rated door propped open with wedge or device, defeating smoke compartment integrity
visual_signals: fire door held open at an angle

description: Corridor width reduced below 8 feet by stored equipment or furniture
visual_signals: beds or carts parked along corridor

description: Ceiling tiles displaced, missing, or showing water stains indicating breach above firewall
Sharps disposal container filled beyond the designated fill line
Oxygen cylinders stored upright without being chained or secured to a wall or rack
Extension cord used as permanent wiring in a patient care area
Fire alarm pull station obstructed by furniture, equipment, or signage
visual_signals: object placed in front of red pull station
pull station not visible from corridor

description: Combustible materials such as boxes or linen stored in corridors
Smoke detector visibly damaged, painted over, or covered
Biohazard waste bag or container left outside designated storage area
Medical gas valve box obstructed or not clearly labeled
Exit sign not illuminated or missing from required location above egress door
